creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

The patch does not apply cleanly, there is no pkg-message, but
files/pkg-message.in.  Could you revise the patch?  Thanks!


On Thu, Mar 13, 2008 at 22:34:34 +0000, lwhsu@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: irc/py-gozerbot update to 0.8.0.4
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-python->lwhsu
> Responsible-Changed-By: lwhsu
> Responsible-Changed-When: Thu Mar 13 22:34:33 UTC 2008
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> I'll take it.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=121679

-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
